ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "hdf5_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset as represented in HDF5 format */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the dataset (e.g., float, double) */,
  "bit_size" INTEGER /* Bit size of the data field */,
  "example_value" REAL /* Example value for the dataset */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or additional information about the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., simulation, observation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the cosmological parameter (e.g., Omega_0) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset it belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the comment pertains to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is active (not deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the dataset */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created or updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Text describing the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., float, double) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_numeric" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data type is numeric */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data type is supported by the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bit_sizes" (
  "bit_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit size */,
  "bit_size" INTEGER /* Bit size of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or usage of this bit size */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bit size is supported by the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset it belongs to */,
  "example_value" REAL /* The example value for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being commented on */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment linked to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "comment_id")
)
